qrDesc: Scan with a supported app to complete sign-in instantly.
openApp: Open the linked app to scan and approve sign-in.
loginDesc: Choose the sign-in method that matches your account policy and continue securely.
registerDesc: Create a secure workspace account with verified email or phone ownership.
resetDesc: Use your email or phone to request a reset code and set a new password.
name: Full Name

registerHighlights.email: Verify ownership with a work email address.
registerHighlights.phone: Use a phone code when mobile-first onboarding is preferred.
registerHighlights.password: Set a strong password for everyday sign-in.

resetHighlights.email: Send a reset code through the verified email channel.
resetHighlights.phone: Use SMS recovery when the account is linked to a phone number.
resetHighlights.password: Finish the reset by confirming a brand-new password.

qrScannedHint: QR scanned. Confirm the login in the linked app to continue.

qrTypeHints.default: Supports backend-issued QR sign-in and approval flows.
qrTypeHints.wechatOfficialAccount: Supports WeChat official account QR sign-in from the backend.

qrStatus.pending: Scan the QR code to continue

errors.passwordResetFailed: Failed to send the password reset request.
errors.qrGenerateFailed: Failed to load the login QR code.
errors.qrStatusFailed: Failed to refresh QR login status.
errors.invalidQrPayload: The backend returned an invalid QR code payload.

oauth.helper: Use a trusted identity provider configured for this workspace.

providerHints.wechat: Scan or authorize through the WeChat identity flow.
providerHints.douyin: Continue with Douyin for creator and mobile-first sign-in.
providerHints.github: Use your GitHub identity for engineering-oriented workspaces.
providerHints.google: Continue with your Google workspace identity.

oauth.processingDesc: The provider has returned to Claw Studio. We are verifying your authorization and creating the session.
oauth.processingHint: Keep this page open until the redirect finishes.
